title: lespedeza × neglecta
intro: Lespedeza × neglecta, also known as roundheaded lespedeza, is a perennial legume native to North America, characterized by its clusters of small white or purple flowers and rounded seed pods. The medicinal properties of Lespedeza × neglecta include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to support kidney and urinary system function, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health. Lespedeza × neglecta can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in traditional herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and vitality.
